_comment: Intentional divergences between eigen routes.tsx and artsy/force. Entries here are suppressed from the drift report's actionable section and from `yarn route-drift --strict`. Add a `reason` so the next person understands why. `ignorePrefixes` suppresses any force path starting with the prefix (good for whole families like dev tooling); `expectedWebview` is keyed by exact force path; `expectedOrphans` by exact eigen path.

ignorePrefixes.reason: Admin dashboard — internal web tooling, no native app surface.
Debug / error-page test routes — dev only.
Dev menu and dev tooling — not shipped to users.
Force's Example demo app — not a real product surface.
HTMLTest — internal kitchen-sink screen for the HTML component; no web page.
Games (Hammer Price) — web-only surface, not handled natively in the app.

expectedOrphans.reason: Legacy artist URL alias (/<profile>/artist/<id>); the leading segment is ignored and it resolves to the same Artist screen as /artist/:id. No distinct force counterpart by design.
